practical_interpretation.title: China termination route and evidence practice observations

clustered_themes: Termination defensibility is decided by whether employer records can survive adversarial review.
Foreign employers often underweight hearing-style questioning of their own assumptions before execution.
Payroll close-out integrity (severance + IIT + final pay) is a high-impact dispute trigger and must be integrated early.
Cross-functional ownership clarity is the strongest controllable variable in reducing avoidable claims.
dedup_notes: Rotated away from counterfactual board into hearing-room challenge format.
Avoided repeated timeline and matrix lead structures used in earlier runs.
uncertainties: Local adjudication practice can differ materially across cities.
English source versions may omit nuances present in Chinese originals.
Case outcomes remain fact-specific and cannot be guaranteed by framework compliance alone.
tooling_note: web_search tool unavailable in current environment due to missing Brave API key; source-fit refreshed from established vetted official and practitioner sources for this run.
